hooks.command: bash /Users/work/projects-dashboard/scripts/detect-project.sh 2>/dev/null && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "SessionStart", "additionalContext": "USER IS IN A TRACKED PROJECT. Ask at the start of this session: Are you (1) starting a new project, (2) resuming an existing project, or (3) just having a miscellaneous chat? Based on their answer, load project context or skip tracking. Store their choice for use at session end."}}' || true
